states.name: declared
states.description: Provider Instance is defined for one Node or approved remote host but not materialized.
entry_requirements: Provider Revision, hosting mode and configuration references are recorded.

states.name: starting
entry_requirements: Start Activity/Attempt and intended generation are recorded.

states.name: running
states.description: Provider process/service incarnation exists; readiness and health remain separate observations.
entry_requirements: Startup Receipt and current Provider generation are recorded.

states.name: draining
states.description: Provider accepts no ordinary new work while existing work is reconciled.
entry_requirements: Drain policy and active work/leases are recorded.

states.name: stopping
entry_requirements: Stop Activity and cleanup expectations are recorded.

states.name: stopped
states.description: Provider incarnation is not running and cannot accept work until a new generation starts.
entry_requirements: Shutdown and cleanup Receipts are retained.

states.name: failed
states.description: Provider incarnation failed or terminated unexpectedly; side-effect uncertainty is reconciled separately.
entry_requirements: Failure evidence, exact generation and recovery/cleanup policy are retained.

states.name: quarantined
states.description: Provider Instance is isolated from dispatch pending security, integrity or policy review.
entry_requirements: Quarantine reason and isolation scope are recorded.

states.name: retired
states.description: Provider Instance identity is retained but cannot start another generation.
entry_requirements: No active attempts/leases remain and retention/cleanup is recorded.

required_preconditions: Provider Revision and hosting assignment are valid.
Authority, compatible capability snapshot and new monotonic generation are fixed.
Startup Receipt and process/service/remote-runtime alias exist; readiness remains separate.
New dispatch is blocked and active work handling is recorded.
Stop/cleanup Activity and treatment of active work are recorded.
Process/service absence or remote shutdown and cleanup/read-back are verified.
Failure source, generation and uncertain operations are retained for reconciliation.
Dispatch is blocked, affected credentials/network/leases are fenced and reason is retained.
No active work/leases remain and cleanup/retention is complete.
